response: {"name":"FastAP","description":"FastAP (Fast Alkaline Phosphatase) is a thermosensitive alkaline phosphatase enzyme reagent used to dephosphorylate RNA (and DNA) ends, commonly employed in CLIP-seq and related protocols to prepare RNA for adapter ligation by removing 5' and 3' phosphate groups.","language":null,"github_repo":null,"bioconda_package":null,"pypi_package":null,"cran_package":null,"license_type":"unknown","open_source_alternative":null,"docker_image":null}
